A Message for You
💌
You are warmly invited to the wedding of
Mary & Ares

✦   💌   ✦
Dearest Friend,

Two hearts that found each other on winding roads, beside still waters, and beneath painted skies are finally ready to say — forever.

Mary & Ares
MAY 23, 2026  ·  CAVITE, PHILIPPINES

From the bridge where their hands first met, to the tunnel that glowed like a promise, to the ocean that bore witness to their love at golden hour — their story is one worth reading.

We joyfully invite you to witness this beautiful beginning.
#AresFinallyGotMary

— With all our love, Ares & Mary

Words of Love

For the Two of Us

A love like ours deserves words that last forever.

"

I love you not only for what you are, but for what I am when I am with you.

— Roy Croft
"

Whatever our souls are made of, his and hers are the same.

— Emily Brontë
"

In all the world, there is no heart for me like yours. In all the world, there is no love for you like mine.

— Maya Angelou
"

You are my today and all of my tomorrows.

— Leo Christopher

I choose you. And I'll choose you over and over and over.
Without pause, without a doubt, in a heartbeat. I'll keep choosing you.

— Psalm Fadri

Captured Moments

Our Gallery

Snapshots of us

A Note on Privacy

We kindly ask that you be mindful of sharing photos and moments from our wedding on social media. We would love for this to be an intimate celebration, and some of our guests may prefer not to appear on public platforms.

If you do share, we'd be grateful if you use our wedding hashtag: #AresFinallyGotMary. Thank you for your thoughtfulness and for being part of our special day.

Mary & Ares
MAY 23, 2026
